validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, public visibility, authenticated push permission, target path, immutable base, target blob, review-branch route, API-only execution, two-file change budget, acceptance criteria, and stop conditions were resolved before mutation.

Canonical Directory Rules, the schema-home ADR, the drift register, parent package documentation, CODEOWNERS, and path-scoped instruction locations were inspected. No AGENTS.md applied and no path move or parallel authority was introduced.
The target doc_id was unique in bounded repository search, no open pull request targeted the file, and the existing document identity and placement were preserved.

Direct reads confirmed kfm-redaction version 0.0.0, an empty __init__.py, and a one-line core.py placeholder. The README removes speculative module and import claims and records the bounded-search limitation.

The prior fail-closed, no-client-side-only-redaction, no-policy-authority, no-receipt-writing, no-release-authority, no-sensitive-fixtures, correction, and rollback controls were preserved and grounded more precisely.

The inspected CodeQL workflow uses pull_request rather than pull_request_target, GitHub-hosted runners, bounded permissions, and no persisted checkout credentials. Broader branch protection and every workflow trigger remain NEEDS VERIFICATION and are not reported as passing.
The final README has one H1, a consecutive heading hierarchy, balanced fenced blocks, no trailing whitespace, a final newline, preserved KFM Meta Block identity, and explicit truth-state boundaries.
Every repository-relative link in the README was resolved through direct GitHub file reads or exact repository search at the pinned base.
The change contains no credentials, private source payloads, real living-person or genomic data, protected coordinates, reversal secrets, or release/publication action.
GitHub returned README blob bb9bf99f9b9384bf30a75acab51a4c61a05238d0 on commit a0d9c124805b4e367408a3db4eeaeaa8f61a643a; it matches the locally recomputed Git blob SHA and SHA-256 artifact hash.

The available connector exposed safe serialized Contents API writes but not an expected-head atomic multi-file commit primitive with a readable base tree. The README and its generated receipt are therefore two sequential commits on a scoped review branch; remote state is re-read between and after writes.
API-only execution was used. The repository was not cloned and repository scripts were not executed. Pull-request checks are reported separately and are not inferred from static inspection.

notes: Task kfm-packages-redaction-namespace-readme-20260719. Documentation-only review-branch change. The receipt records provenance and validation boundaries; it is not approval, proof, policy permission, release authority, or publication authority.
